ideation: This animation sequence portrays a firefighter in action, using both arms in a coordinated manner.  The left arm will hold a (simulated) hose, while the right arm will be in a ready position. The movements should reflect alertness and readiness. Frame 1 establishes a base pose. Frame 2 shows the left arm extending with the hose, while the right arm remains alert. Frame 3 has the left arm continuing its extension, and the right arm prepares to move. Frame 4 will show a slight adjustment to both arms for realism. Frame 5 will show the firefighter returning to a ready position. Let's get this done!

frames.beat: left arm extends forward with the hose, right arm stays alert
left arm continues to push the hose, right arm prepares to assist
both arms adjust slightly for a better grip
firefighter returns to a ready stance, hose held firm
